title: Cashier and Admin
description:
Company Overview

We are a purveyor of prime choices of meat, artisanal cheeses and fine wines located at the heart of the gentrifying neighbourhood of Ghim Moh.

Job Summary

As Assistant Manager, you will drive sales and operational excellence across retail and wholesale channels, leveraging digital platforms and supplier relationships to optimize inventory and customer engagement. You will lead initiatives to meet sales targets, coordinate marketing efforts, and support team performance to contribute to business growth.

Responsibilities

  • Lead sales efforts for meats, wines, cheeses, and gourmet items to achieve daily sales targets and incentives
  • Manage product listings, inventory updates, and descriptions on third-party platforms such as GrabMart, Deliveroo, and the company’s Shopify website to ensure accurate and timely availability
  • Operate and learn the inventory control system to perform stock checks on meat deliveries and maintain optimal inventory levels
  • Organize and coordinate deliveries for retail and wholesale customers, ensuring timely and accurate order fulfillment
  • Independently reorder stock from suppliers when inventory levels are low and research new or replacement products to maintain a competitive product range
  • Adhere to company SOPs and production standards to maintain quality and consistency in operations
  • Utilize digital communication channels (WhatsApp, emails, phone calls) to engage customers, perform soft selling, and execute service recovery when necessary
  • Support administrative tasks including creating, filing, and organizing invoices and documents for accounting purposes
  • Assist in calculating commission payments for related parties to ensure accurate financial processing
  • Collaborate with the team and external service providers to develop and coordinate marketing promotions that drive sales growth
  • Track sales incentives and motivate the team to achieve daily and monthly sales goals
  • Plan and coordinate key sales periods such as Christmas and Chinese New Year with owners and external partners to maximize revenue opportunities
  • Work retail hours totaling 52 hours per week, contributing to operational and sales objectives.
  • 70% of time will be spend on the ground as cashier and 30% for more administrative tasks.
